name: @forgeax/engine-audio-webaudio
description: Web Audio API browser backend for forgeax-engine — AudioContext lifecycle, bus topology, tick systems, clip loader.

bundle-size.reason: MVP Web Audio backend (tick systems + AudioContext lifecycle); bundle-size lock deferred to a future feat once all systems and clip loader stabilise

fps.reason: library package; fps is reported by apps that consume the audio tick system in their render loop

bench.reason: Web Audio API backend hot-path profiling deferred to a future feat after the tick system implementation matures

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; test surface coverage runs as part of pnpm test:unit + tsc -b

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; this is a production MVP per plan-strategy D-1 (dual-package split)
